title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat but could be exploited by attackers to identify unpatched vulnerabilities in systems if misused. The tool's popularity could also lead to over-reliance without proper validation of its findings.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment to ensure it aligns with organizational security policies.
Train security teams to validate the scanner's findings and avoid over-reliance on automated tools.
Monitor the tool's development and community activity for any signs of malicious forks or misuse.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

bpf: Free reuseport cBPF...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

bpf: Free reuseport cBPF prog after RCU grace period.

Eulgyu Kim reported the splat below with a repro. [0]

The repro sets up a UDP reuseport group with a cBPF prog and
replaces it with a new one while another thread is sending
a UDP packet to the group.

The reuseport prog is freed by sk_reuseport_prog_free().
bpf_prog_put() is called for "e"BPF prog to destruct through
multiple stages while cBPF prog is freed immediately by

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-52910.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

ip6_vti: set netns_immutable...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

ip6_vti: set netns_immutable on the fallback device.

john1988 and Noam Rathaus reported that vti6_init_net() does not set the
netns_immutable flag on the per-netns fallback tunnel device (ip6_vti0).

Other similar tunnel drivers (like ip6_tunnel, sit, ip6_gre, and ip_tunnel)
correctly set this flag during their fallback device initialization to
prevent them from being moved to another network namespace.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Linux kernel's ip6_vti module could allow attackers to exploit the lack of the netns_immutable flag on the fallback device, potentially enabling unauthorized movement of the fallback tunnel device between network namespaces. This could lead to privilege escalation, unauthorized access, or network segmentation bypass.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest Linux kernel patches that address CVE-2026-52909 to ensure the netns_immutable flag is properly set for ip6_vti fallback devices.
Audit systems using the ip6_vti module to identify any potential misuse or misconfiguration of network namespaces.
Monitor for unusual activity related to network namespace changes or tunnel device configurations, and implement additional logging for network namespace operations.

title: Chromacam 4.0.3.0 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the PsyFrameGrabberService...
description: Chromacam 4.0.3.0 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the PsyFrameGrabberService that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by placing malicious executables in unquoted path directories. Attackers with write access to C:\ or subdirectories like C:\Program Files (x86)\Personify\ can place a malicious Program.exe or PsyFrameGrabberService.exe file that executes with LocalSystem privileges when the service starts automatically at boot.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2023-54353.

title: The compose-rich-editor library (v1.0.0-rc14) used in HCL Verse for Android's rich text email...
description: The compose-rich-editor library (v1.0.0-rc14) used in HCL Verse for Android's rich text email composition fails to properly validate all HTML input thereby allowing malicious content to be executed in certain situations.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the compose-rich-editor library (v1.0.0-rc14) used in HCL Verse for Android could allow attackers to inject and execute malicious HTML content. This may lead to cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks, data theft, or unauthorized actions within the application.
recommended_actions: Upgrade the compose-rich-editor library to a patched version that addresses CVE-2026-21768.
Implement input validation and sanitization mechanisms to prevent execution of malicious HTML content.
Conduct a security review of the application to identify and mitigate any additional vulnerabilities related to HTML input handling.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

RDMA: During rereg_mr ensure...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

RDMA: During rereg_mr ensure that REREG_ACCESS is compatible

If IB_MR_REREG_ACCESS changes from RO to RW then the umem has to be
re-evaluated to ensure it is properly pinned as RW. Since the umem is
hidden inside each driver's mr struct add a ib_umem_check_rereg() function
that each driver has to call before processing IB_MR_REREG_ACCESS.

mlx4 has to retain its duplicate ib_access_writable check because it
implements IB_MR_RE

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-52908.

title: AVAST Antivirus 25.11 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the SecureLine service...
description: AVAST Antivirus 25.11 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the SecureLine service that allows local non-privileged users to execute code with elevated SYSTEM privileges. Attackers can exploit the unquoted binary path in the service configuration to inject malicious executables that execute with high-level system permissions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The unquoted service path vulnerability in AVAST Antivirus 25.11's SecureLine service allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges, potentially leading to full system compromise. This could be exploited to install malware, exfiltrate sensitive data, or disrupt operations.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update from AVAST immediately to address the vulnerability.
Restrict local user access to systems running AVAST Antivirus to minimize exploitation risk.
Audit and monitor systems for signs of exploitation, such as unexpected processes running with SYSTEM privileges.

title: Malwarebytes 4.5 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the MBAMService executable...
description: Malwarebytes 4.5 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the MBAMService executable that allows local attackers to escalate privileges by injecting malicious code into the system root path. Attackers can place executable files in unquoted path directories that execute with LocalSystem privileges during service startup or system reboot.

title: Brother SAPSprint 7.60 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the SAPSprint service...
description: Brother SAPSprint 7.60 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the SAPSprint service binary that allows local attackers to escalate privileges. Attackers can place a malicious executable in the Program Files directory path to be executed with LocalSystem privileges when the service starts automatically.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The unquoted service path vulnerability in Brother SAPSprint 7.60 allows local attackers to escalate privileges to LocalSystem, potentially enabling full control over the affected system. This could lead to unauthorized access, data theft, or further exploitation of the compromised machine.
recommended_actions: Ensure all service paths in Brother SAPSprint 7.60 are properly quoted to prevent exploitation of the vulnerability. Apply vendor-provided patches or updates if available.
Restrict local access to systems running Brother SAPSprint and monitor for unauthorized changes to the Program Files directory.
Implement application whitelisting to prevent execution of unauthorized binaries and conduct regular security audits to identify misconfigurations.

Attackers can insert malicious executables in the system root path that execute with elevated privileges during application startup or system reboot.

title: Comodo Chromodo Browser 52.15.25.664 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the...
description: Comodo Chromodo Browser 52.15.25.664 contains an unquoted service path vulnerability in the ChromodoUpdater service that runs with SYSTEM privileges. A local attacker can insert a malicious executable in the service path and execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges upon service restart or system reboot.

Audit systems for unquoted service paths and implement proper quoting practices for all service paths to prevent exploitation.

title: CVE-2026-48610 - Under certain network configurations, a malicious actor with access to network could exploit an Impr
description: Under certain network configurations, a malicious actor with access to network could exploit an Improper Access Control vulnerability found in certain devices running UniFi OS to make unauthorized changes to such UniFi OS devices.

recommended_actions: Immediately update all UniFi OS devices to the latest firmware version that addresses CVE-2026-48610.
Restrict network access to trusted devices and implement network segmentation to limit exposure.

title: CVE-2026-20746 - Virtual attribute handling in Ping Identity PingDirectory in affected versions allows only authorize
description: Virtual attribute handling in Ping Identity PingDirectory in affected versions allows only authorized users to exhaust java memory heap when recent login history is enabled and copying virtual attributes that reference ds-privilege-name values.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20746.

title: CVE-2026-9125 - The Presto Player plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'link_ur
description: The Presto Player plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'link_url' parameter of the [presto_player_overlay] shortcode in versions up to, and including, 4.2.0 This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping in the getOverlays() function, which copies the link_url shortcode attribute directly into the overlay configuration without scheme validation, allowing javascript: URIs to survive and be rendered as the href of a clickable anchor element by the presto-dynamic-overlay-ui web component. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9125.

title: CVE-2026-45170 - Idira Privilege Cloud Connector versions prior 1.1.100504 under specific conditions and configuratio
description: Idira Privilege Cloud Connector versions prior 1.1.100504 under specific conditions and configuration scenarios, TLS certificate validation may not be fully enforced. CyberArk Security Bulletin: CA26-17

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-45170.

title: CVE-2026-11933 - A use-after-free vulnerability exists in MongoDB Server's server-side JavaScript engine when convert
description: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in MongoDB Server's server-side JavaScript engine when converting BSON documents to JavaScript arrays. An authenticated user with read privileges who is able to run server-side JavaScript (for example, via $where or $function) can cause the server to access memory that has already been freed. This may result in disclosure of information from the mongod process memory or a denial of service through a server crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11933.

title: CVE-2026-49482 - ClipBucket v5 is an open source video sharing platform. Prior to version 5.5.3 - #141, ClipBucket v5
description: ClipBucket v5 is an open source video sharing platform. Prior to version 5.5.3 - #141, ClipBucket v5 contains an improper neutralization of SQL wildcard characters in the subtitle editing endpoint. An authenticated user can send a % character as the number parameter to overwrite all subtitle titles of any video they own in a single HTTP request. This issue has been patched in version 5.5.3 - #141.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-49482.

title: CVE-2026-10676 - Rejected reason: This CVE Record has been rejected by the Zephyr Project CNA. Subsequent analysis de
description: Rejected reason: This CVE Record has been rejected by the Zephyr Project CNA. Subsequent analysis determined that the addressed defect is not reachable in any released version of Zephyr: on every supported release branch the affected value is corrected before it is used, and the change that exposes the defect exists only in unreleased development code. As no released version is affected, this identifier is withdrawn.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10676.
